text: In this space, I feel a sense of curiosity and contemplation. The glass walls and the brightly-lit, modern environment evoke an atmosphere of anticipation—as if knowledge and discovery are just within reach, behind transparent barriers. When I move into the R+D exhibit, surrounded by bold colors and interactive displays, I feel engaged and provoked. I am compelled to reflect on the relationship between humans and machines, and my presence here feels like part of a larger philosophical experiment. The combination of clarity, design, and the gentle hum of potential innovation fills me with quiet awe and wonder.
